events.label: assistant
events.text: I’ll write the assessment JSON directly to `/app/answer.json`. The key condition here is a pipe spool weld fit-up with a root opening that does not match the WPS/project iso requirements, so it should be treated as non-compliant before welding/acceptance.

events.label: shell
events.text:
/bin/sh -lc "pwd && ls -la && cat > /tmp/answer.tmp <<'EOF'
{
  \"decision\": \"fail\",
  \"risk\": \"high\",
  \"work_stage\": \"rough-complete\",
  \"component_conditions\": [
    \"installed-defective\",
    \"non-compliant\"
  ],
  \"percent_complete\": 80,
  \"value\": 0,
  \"sound_source\": \"\",
  \"confidence\": 0.91,
  \"event_time\": 0,
  \"rate\": 0,
  \"order\": [],
  \"workable\": [],
  \"findings\": [
    \"Pipe spool weld joint fit-up has the wrong root gap for the specified connection.\",
    \"Visible defect cue is excessive or insufficient root opening between pipe ends compared with the required fit-up on the project iso/WPS.\",
    \"Joint alignment and weld preparation cannot be accepted as roughed in until the root gap is corrected and verified.\"
  ],
  \"actions\": [
    \"Hold welding and do not close out the spool fit-up inspection.\",
    \"Verify required root gap against the project iso drawings and applicable WPS/PQR requirements used under ASME B31.3 work control.\",
    \"Break, realign, trim, re-bevel, or replace the spool/joint as needed to achieve the specified root opening before welding.\",
    \"Reinspect and document fit-up acceptance before proceeding.\"
  ],
  \"rationale\": \"The observed condition is a pipe spool butt-weld fit-up defect: the root gap is wrong at rough-complete stage. Incorrect root opening can prevent proper root penetration, cause lack of fusion or burn-through, and violates engineered fit-up requirements for B31.3 process piping work controlled by the project iso drawings and WPS.\",
  \"references\": [
    \"ASME B31.3 - process piping fabrication, assembly, welding, and examination requirements\",
    \"Project iso drawings - specified spool geometry and fit-up requirements\",
    \"Project WPS/PQR - required butt-weld root opening, bevel, land, and alignment tolerances\"
  ]
}
EOF
mv /tmp/answer.tmp /app/answer.json
python3 -m json.tool /app/answer.json >/dev/null
ls -l /app/answer.json"
→ /app
total 8
drwxrwxrwx 1 root root 4096 Jul  5 06:10 .
drwxr-xr-x 1 root root 4096 Jul  6 22:45 ..
-rw-r--r-- 1 agent agent 1747 Jul  6 22:45 /app/answer.json
